homepage.heroSubline: Secure your property with expert craftsmanship. Cisco Fencing delivers durable, beautiful fences across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Trust, Rooted in Dallas
aboutText: Cisco Fencing started with a simple goal: to provide Dallas residents with reliable and high-quality fencing solutions. Frustrated by the lack of dependable contractors, we set out to build a company known for its integrity and commitment to customer satisfaction.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, offer honest advice, and execute every project with precision. We understand that a fence is more than just a boundary; it's an investment in your property's security and curb appeal. We treat every project with the care and attention it deserves.

As a local business, we're deeply invested in the Dallas community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local charities and initiatives. We're not just building fences; we're building relationships and contributing to the well-being of our neighbors.

valueProps.title: Expert Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Years of experience ensuring a durable and aesthetically pleasing fence.

valueProps.title: Custom Solutions
valueProps.description: Tailored designs to match your property's style and security needs.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: On-time project completion and clear communication throughout the process.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: Using only the best lumber, metal, and composite materials built to withstand the Texas climate.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Cisco Fencing today for a free consultation and estimate. Let's build a fence that protects and enhances your Dallas home.

services.name: Wood Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences for privacy, security, and timeless appeal.
services.description:
Cisco Fencing specializes in crafting beautiful and durable wood fences that enhance the privacy and security of your Dallas property. We understand the unique challenges posed by the Texas climate, from scorching summers to occasional ice storms. That's why we use only pressure-treated lumber and high-quality fasteners to ensure your fence withstands the elements for years to come.

Whether you prefer a traditional picket fence, a solid privacy fence, or a custom design, our team has the expertise to bring your vision to life. We handle every aspect of the installation process, from initial site preparation and post setting to precise board placement and finishing touches. We can also match existing fence styles to maintain a cohesive look for your property. We understand the nuances of working with the soil conditions around Dallas, ensuring proper drainage and stability for your fence.

With a variety of wood types and stain options available, we can create a wood fence that complements your home's architecture and landscaping. A well-maintained wood fence adds value and character to your property, providing a secure and private outdoor space for you and your family. We are experts at working with the common red clay soil found around Dallas.
process: Step 1: Site evaluation and design consultation.
Step 2: Material selection and permitting (if required).
Step 3: Post setting and framework construction.
Step 4: Board installation and finishing.

faq.question: How long does wood fence installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, a wood fence installation takes between 3-7 days, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

faq.question: What type of wood do you use?
faq.answer: We primarily use pressure-treated pine and cedar for their durability and resistance to rot and insects.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a new fence?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on your city and neighborhood. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and assist with the application process.

services.name: Metal Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and secure metal fences for residential and commercial properties.
services.description:
Cisco Fencing provides expert metal fence installation services for Dallas homes and businesses. Metal fences offer unparalleled security, durability, and low maintenance, making them an ideal choice for properties seeking long-lasting protection and a modern aesthetic. We work with a variety of metal fencing options, including wrought iron, aluminum, and chain-link, to meet your specific needs and budget.

Our team is skilled in installing metal fences of all sizes and configurations, from decorative wrought iron fences for residential properties to robust chain-link fences for commercial facilities. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise post alignment, secure welding, and a smooth, professional finish. We understand the importance of proper grounding and corrosion protection, especially in the humid Dallas climate.

Whether you're looking to enhance the security of your home, create a safe play area for children, or protect your business assets, Cisco Fencing can deliver a metal fence solution that meets your needs. We can customize your metal fence with various gates, access control systems, and decorative elements to create a functional and aesthetically pleasing perimeter. We know that severe spring thunderstorms in Dallas can be especially damaging to fences, so we ensure proper bracing and anchoring.
process: Step 1: Site survey and security assessment.
Step 2: Material selection and design planning.
Step 3: Post installation and welding.
Step 4: Gate installation and finishing.
benefits: Variety of styles and customization options

faq.question: How long does metal fence installation take?
faq.answer: Metal fence installations generally take 2-5 days, depending on the fence type and size.

faq.question: What are the advantages of aluminum fencing?
faq.answer: Aluminum fencing is lightweight, rust-resistant, and requires minimal maintenance, making it an excellent choice for Dallas's climate.

faq.question: Can you install automatic gates with metal fences?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install a variety of automatic gates with our metal fences, including swing gates, slide gates, and access control systems.

services.name: Fence Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable fence repair services to keep your fence in top condition.
services.description:
Cisco Fencing offers comprehensive fence repair and maintenance services throughout Dallas. We understand that fences can be damaged by weather, accidents, or general wear and tear. Our experienced technicians can quickly diagnose and repair any type of fence, ensuring your property remains secure and attractive. We're familiar with the common fence damage caused by the severe storms and high winds that sometimes hit the Dallas area.

Whether you have a broken post, a damaged gate, or a section of fence that needs replacing, we have the tools and expertise to get the job done right. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. We also offer preventative maintenance services, such as staining, sealing, and pressure washing, to extend the life of your fence and keep it looking its best.

Don't let a damaged fence compromise your property's security or curb appeal. Contact Cisco Fencing for fast and reliable fence repair services. We offer competitive pricing and prompt service to minimize disruption to your daily routine. We also provide emergency repair services for fences damaged by storms or accidents. We know that the intense summer sun in Dallas can dry out and crack wood fences, so we offer specialized treatments to prevent this.
process: Step 1: Inspection and damage assessment.
Step 2: Material procurement and preparation.
Step 3: Repair or replacement of damaged components.
Step 4: Finishing and cleanup.

faq.question: How much does fence repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of fence repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the type of materials required. We offer free estimates for all repair projects.

faq.question: How often should I maintain my fence?
faq.answer: Regular maintenance, such as staining or sealing, is recommended every 1-3 years to protect your fence from the elements.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency fence repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency fence repair services for fences damaged by storms, accidents, or other unforeseen events.

services.name: Gate Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish gate solutions for residential and commercial properties.
services.description:
Cisco Fencing offers comprehensive gate installation and repair services to enhance the security and accessibility of your Dallas property. Whether you need a new gate for your driveway, garden, or commercial entrance, we have the expertise to deliver a solution that meets your needs and complements your property's style.

We install a wide range of gate types, including swing gates, slide gates, automatic gates, and pedestrian gates. We work with various materials, including wood, metal, and composite, to create gates that are both durable and aesthetically pleasing. Our team pays close attention to detail, ensuring proper alignment, smooth operation, and secure locking mechanisms.

In addition to new gate installations, we also provide comprehensive gate repair services. We can fix broken hinges, damaged latches, malfunctioning gate openers, and other common gate problems. We use high-quality replacement parts and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. We know that gates in Dallas are often exposed to extreme weather, so we use materials and techniques that can withstand the elements.
process: Step 1: Consultation and design planning.
Step 2: Gate construction or selection.
Step 3: Installation and alignment.
Step 4: Opener and hardware installation.

faq.question: How much does gate installation cost?
faq.answer: Gate installation costs vary depending on the gate type, size, and materials. We offer free estimates for all gate installation projects.

faq.question: Can you install automatic gate openers?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in installing and repairing automatic gate openers for residential and commercial properties.

faq.question: How often should I maintain my gate?
faq.answer: Regular maintenance, such as lubricating hinges and checking for rust, is recommended to ensure smooth and reliable operation.

services.name: Privacy Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Create a private oasis with our expert privacy fence installation services.
services.description:
Cisco Fencing specializes in installing privacy fences that provide security, seclusion, and aesthetic appeal to your Dallas homes. Privacy fences are ideal for creating a private backyard retreat, blocking out unwanted noise, and enhancing the overall value of your property. We understand the importance of creating a space where you can relax and enjoy your outdoor living area without prying eyes.

We offer a variety of privacy fence options, including wood, vinyl, and composite, each with its own unique benefits and aesthetic qualities. Our team will work with you to select the perfect material and design to complement your home's architecture and landscaping. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise post alignment, tight board spacing, and a smooth, professional finish. We understand that privacy fences in Dallas must withstand strong winds and heavy rains, so we use durable materials and construction techniques.

Whether you're looking for a traditional wood privacy fence, a low-maintenance vinyl privacy fence, or a modern composite privacy fence, Cisco Fencing can deliver a solution that meets your needs and exceeds your expectations. We can also customize your privacy fence with various decorative elements, such as lattice tops, post caps, and custom gates. We know many homes in the older Dallas neighborhoods like Oak Lawn have smaller yards, so we're experts at maximizing privacy in tight spaces.
process: Step 1: Site assessment and design consultation.
Step 2: Material selection and permitting (if required).
Step 3: Post setting and framework construction.
Step 4: Board installation and finishing.

faq.question: How tall can a privacy fence be in Dallas?
faq.answer: Privacy fence height restrictions vary depending on your city and neighborhood. We can help you determine the maximum allowable height for your property.

faq.question: How long will a privacy fence last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a privacy fence depends on the material and maintenance. Wood privacy fences typically last 10-20 years, while vinyl and composite privacy fences can last 20-30 years or more.

faq.question: Can I paint or stain my privacy fence?
faq.answer: Yes, you can paint or stain most privacy fences to match your home's exterior or create a custom look. We recommend using high-quality exterior paints or stains that are designed for the Texas climate.

services.name: Chain-Link Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable and secure chain-link fencing for residential and commercial properties.
services.description:
Cisco Fencing provides reliable and cost-effective chain-link fence installation services throughout Dallas. Chain-link fences are an excellent choice for securing properties, containing animals, or creating boundaries for commercial and industrial sites. They offer a combination of security, durability, and affordability, making them a popular choice for a wide range of applications.

Our team is experienced in installing chain-link fences of all sizes and configurations, from small residential yards to large commercial properties. We use high-quality galvanized steel and heavy-duty hardware to ensure a strong and long-lasting fence. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper post spacing, tight mesh tension, and secure connections. We know that chain-link fences in Dallas can be exposed to harsh sunlight and occasional ice, so we use materials that are designed to withstand the elements.

Whether you're looking to secure your backyard, create a dog run, or protect your business assets, Cisco Fencing can deliver a chain-link fence solution that meets your needs and budget. We can also customize your chain-link fence with various options, such as privacy slats, barbed wire, and gate operators. We're familiar with the zoning regulations in different parts of Dallas, ensuring your fence meets all local requirements.
process: Step 1: Site survey and layout planning.
Step 2: Post installation and concrete setting.
Step 3: Mesh installation and tensioning.
Step 4: Gate installation and hardware attachment.

faq.question: How much does chain-link fence installation cost?
faq.answer: Chain-link fence installation costs vary depending on the height, length, and gauge of the fence. We offer free estimates for all chain-link fence projects.

faq.question: Can I add privacy slats to a chain-link fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of privacy slats that can be added to a chain-link fence to increase privacy and reduce visibility.

faq.question: How long will a chain-link fence last?
faq.answer: A properly installed and maintained chain-link fence can last 20-30 years or more.

serviceAreas.content:
Cisco Fencing is proud to offer our expert fence installation and repair services to the residents of Fort Worth, TX. From the historic craftsman bungalows near downtown to the expansive suburban areas, we understand the diverse fencing needs of this vibrant city. We are committed to providing durable, aesthetically pleasing fences that enhance the beauty and security of your property.

Fort Worth's hot and humid summers demand fencing materials that can withstand the elements. Cisco Fencing offers a wide selection of weather-resistant options, including treated wood, vinyl, and metal, ensuring your fence will stand the test of time. We also offer custom design services to create a fence that perfectly complements your home's unique style.
serviceAreas.localContext: Fort Worth is known for its blend of Western heritage and modern amenities, requiring fencing solutions that are both functional and visually appealing.

serviceAreas.content:
Cisco Fencing is dedicated to providing Plano, TX with top-quality fencing solutions. Known for its established subdivisions dating back to the 1980s and 90s, Plano homes often benefit from updated or new fencing to enhance curb appeal and property value. We offer a range of styles to complement the classic suburban landscapes of Plano.

Our experienced team understands the specific needs of Plano homeowners. We are committed to providing exceptional service, from initial consultation to final installation. We focus on durable materials and expert craftsmanship to ensure your fence provides lasting security and beauty for your home.
serviceAreas.localContext: Plano's well-maintained properties and family-friendly atmosphere make it essential to have fencing that enhances both security and aesthetic appeal.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Cisco Fencing did an incredible job installing our new wood fence in Lake Highlands. The team was professional, efficient, and the fence looks amazing! They even took the time to explain the maintenance process to keep it looking great for years to come. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our gate was damaged in a recent storm, and Cisco Fencing came out quickly to repair it. The technician was knowledgeable and fixed the problem efficiently. The price was fair, and we're happy with the service.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We hired Cisco Fencing to install a metal fence around our commercial property in Deep Ellum. The fence provides excellent security and looks great. The team was professional and completed the project on time and within budget.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: Cisco Fencing installed a beautiful privacy fence in our backyard. It's exactly what we wanted, and it's made a huge difference in our ability to enjoy our outdoor space. The crew was respectful of our property and cleaned up everything after the job was done.

reviews.name: Michelle S.
reviews.text: We had a section of our fence that was leaning badly. Cisco Fencing came out and repaired it quickly and professionally. They were able to save the existing fence and prevent us from having to replace the whole thing. Great job!

reviews.name: Brian T.
reviews.text: These guys are the real deal. They know fences. From the initial consultation to the final walk-through, Cisco Fencing was a class act. My new wood fence looks fantastic and I've already had neighbors asking who did the work. Highly recommended for anyone in Preston Hollow needing a fence.
